title: pseuderanthemum carruthersii
intro: Pseuderanthemum carruthersii, also known as Carruthers' false anthea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pseuderanthemum carruthersii include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as the alleviation of coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Pseuderanthemum carruthersii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
